texts: WEIGHTS & MEASURES (LEGAL METROLOGY) DEPARTMENT,  GOVERNMENT OF MANIPUR

Weights and Measures (Legal Metrology) Department Manipur operates under the Ministry of Consumer Affairs Food & Public Distribution.
Many other states across India have already updated their naming convention to reflect compliance with the modern Legal Metrology Act, 2009 and have changed to  “ Department of Legal Metrology”.
“Department of Weights and Measures” has proposed nomenclature change to the “Department of Legal Metrology” in the State of Manipur.

Filling up the vacant post is essential as the Department is presently functioning with limited staff strength against the sanctioned posts, resulting in excessive workload and hampering effective, uninterrupted functioning of Verification, inspection of weights and measures.
DIH quota for Group-C is reserved for 2(two) posts of Laboratory Attendant and Group-D is reserved for 1(one) post of Sweeper.
tables: Vacancies propose for DR on May. 2026

texts:
The Weights & Measures Department offices in their own land.
Head office: 
	Office of the Controller, Weights & Measures, Manipur, Lamphel
Imphal East & Imphal West attached at Head Office, Lamphel.  
Branch office Bishnupur (own land) at Bishnupur Bazar. 

Branch Office at Mini Secretariat:
Thoubal  & Kakching Branch Office at Thoubal Mini Secretariat.
Senapati Branch Office at Senapati Mini Secretariat.
Tengnoupal & Chandel Branch Office at ADC Office Moreh.

The following branch Offices are in rent:
Tamenglong Branch office
Ukhrul Branch office
Jiribam Branch office
Kangpokpi Branch office
Churachandpur Branch office
Thanlon Branch Office
Updation of Calibration Platform & overhead proving measures

The water loading platform and Overhead Water Tank which is used for calibration of oil tankers at Weights & Measures Department, Manipur has been propose for a new construction and upgradation as it is old and damaged at some points and therefore at times arises inaccuracy of the calibration as compared with the calibration facilities available at IOCL, Malom Depot.
Current condition of water loading platform and Overhead Water Tank at Weights & Measures, Lamphel
Water loading platform and Overhead proving measures at IOCL Malom Depot

At present the Department is ongoing Re-verification programme at IOCL Malom Depot, Malom and other periodical Re-verification under Legal Metrology Act 2009 and the rules made hereunder will be continued as per the stipulated time.
Verification
Testing instruments for accuracy. 
Stamping
Official seal indicating compliance with legal standards. 
Benefits
Ensures reliability 
Prevents manipulation 
Builds consumer trust
Inspection Drive at Nagamapal, Imphal West
Re-verification program at IOCL, Malom Depot
